# libredash dashboards query-table

Query a dashboard table

## Usage

```sh
libredash dashboards query-table <dashboard> <table> [flags]
```

## Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--count` | int | `0` | row count |
| `--filters-json` | string | `` | dashboard filters JSON |
| `--page` | string | `` | dashboard page id |
| `--target` | string | `` | LibreDash server URL |
| `--token` | string | `` | API token |

## Inherited options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--workspace` | string | `` | workspace id |
